title: Move items to a specific position in a board
excerpt: I would like to propose the addition of a new method in the API that allows for moving an item to a specific position within the same board. This method could accept the new position as a parameter based on the new paren…

posts.author: MiguelAngel (Miguel Angel Garcia Gomez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to propose the addition of a new method in the API that allows for moving an item to a specific position within the same board. This method could accept the new position as a parameter based on the new parent item and should also support moving subitems.
An example implementation could be:

mutation {
  move_item_to_position (board_id:1234567890, item_id:9876543210, parent_item_id:123456789) {
    id
  }
}

Thank you for considering this feature request.
